Gold Value Estimator

Enter your jewelry's approximate weight and karatage to see a preliminary payout range. Final offers are based on hardware-verified readings at our kiosk.

Approximate gross weight including any stones or clasps. XRF verification at kiosk provides the exact net weight.

Not sure of karatage? Check for BIS hallmark stamp. Our XRF spectrometer will verify the exact purity at the kiosk.

Goldify

India's most transparent phygital jewelry liquidation platform. Powered by XRF spectrometry and GIA-certified diamond verification.
